entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary crop being improved for resistance to Maize Lethal Necrosis

entities.name: MAIZE LETHAL NECROSIS
entities.description: A disease caused by the co-infection of MCMV and SCMV causing yield losses in maize

entities.name: MAIZE CHLOROTIC MOTTLE VIRUS
entities.description: One of the two viruses that co-infect to cause Maize Lethal Necrosis

entities.name: SUGARCANE MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: One of the two viruses that co-infect to cause Maize Lethal Necrosis

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The region where Maize Lethal Necrosis causes significant yield losses

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BACKCROSS
entities.description: A traditional breeding method used for maize improvement

entities.name: MOLECULAR TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to shorten the breeding process in maize improvement

entities.name: KS23-6
entities.description: A donor parent used to transfer quantitative trait loci for resistance to MLN

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with the resistance to Maize Lethal Necrosis

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO MLN
entities.description: The ability of maize to withstand Maize Lethal Necrosis

entities.name: KIBOKO
entities.description: A location in Kenya where nurseries were established for breeding

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the research and field trials were conducted

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding approach using molecular markers to transfer specific traits

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM MARKERS
entities.description: Markers linked to QTL for resistance to MLN used for genotyping

entities.name: KOMPETITIVE ALLELE SPECIFIC PCR
entities.description: A genotyping platform used to detect SNP markers

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INOCULATION
entities.description: Field conditions used to evaluate and validate resistance to MLN

entities.name: NAIVASHA
entities.description: A location in Kenya where validation trials were conducted

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic makeup of the BC3F2 lines
